doc: PATTERN CARDS v1 вҖ” caption MECHANISMS (chain-style, hand-drafted by the orchestra from the clean+SHORT pool + Mohamed gold/kills; RABIE-judged PROVISIONAL). Nothing enters the prompt menu before Mohamed ratifies. A ratified pattern becomes a PLAYER (attribution + bench arithmetic).

survivors.move: Ask the audience a REAL taste question and stay silent вҖ” the comments become the content. NEVER a comparison question: the brand never asks who does it better (Mohamed's law: the brand IS the best). Ask about THEIR habits, preferences, rituals вҖ” never about rivals or rankings.
survivors.skeleton: single-question hook + curious peer register + <=12 words + beats: (1) the taste question about THEM (not us, not rivals), (2) hand the mic over, (3) brand stays silent
survivors.when: Community pillar, drink/dish debates with real factions (karak spice, matcha, mandi vs madhbi), engagement weeks. NOT when the brand secretly wants one answer (rigged polls smell), and not as a mask for product launches.
survivors.example_real: ШӘШӯШЁЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§ШӘШҙШ§Шҹ
survivors.example_fresh: Ш§Щ„ЩғШұЩғ ШЁЩҮЩҠЩ„ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ ШІШ№ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶШҹ Ш§ШӯШіЩ…ЩҲЩҮШ§ рҹ‘Ү
survivors.anti: COMPARISON CREEP вҖ” any 'who does it best/ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ Щ…ЩӮЩҮЩү' framing is dead by law (brand_never_invites_comparison). Also: rigged questions where only the brand can be the answer, and asking then ghosting the replies. | MERGED INSIGHT (crowd_is_the_expert): answering the replies IS part of the move вҖ” ghosting or arguing kills it permanently; cede the choice of the NEXT item, never a ranking.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B has the loudest taste tribes in Saudi (karak, kabsa rice schools, bakery wars). Beauty version exists (blush shades); avoid in real estate where 'debate' reads as doubt.
survivors.judge_why: The rarest confidence play in the pool вҖ” brand asks a real factional question and stays silent, even pointing beyond its own menu; corpus gold, sharp anti against rigged funnels. | OWNER CORRECTION: strip all who-does-it-best framing.
survivors.status: REJECTED Г—2 (v2 rejected вҳ…2 at 23:59, bare-caption format; second strike) вҖ” quarantined pending the morning re-show ruling

survivors.move: Seat two generations in one frame and let the elder's smallest gesture вҖ” a smile, a hand, an inherited recipe вҖ” carry the whole feeling, with the product as the table between them, never the subject.
survivors.skeleton: quiet declarative hook, no question В· tender register, zero slang, zero exclamation В· <=12 words В· beat 1: the shared object, beat 2: the elder's (or heir's) gesture that completes it.
survivors.when: Eids, family seasons, heritage dishes (jereesh, kabsa, saleeg), lifestyle pillar. Selling is ALLOWED on emotional days (Mohamed's ruling 2026-06-12) вҖ” but this move works best CTA-free or with a soft order-line; a hard sell next to an elder's memory cheapens the move itself. NOT for trend items or delivery-speed messages.
survivors.example_real: NONE in the clean corpus (0/1,975 short exemplars feature an elder) вҖ” the move is MOHAMED-ORIGIN: born from his golded Eid line, not benchmark practice. Whitespace differentiation, like owned_flaw_confession.
survivors.example_fresh: ЩҲШөЩҒШ© Ш¬ШҜШӘЩҠ ЩҶЩҒШіЩҮШ§ШҢ ШЁШі Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… ШЁЩҠШҜ ШӯЩҒЩҠШҜШӘЩҮШ§ рҹӨҚ
survivors.anti: Grandparent-as-prop: the elder appears only to bless the brand. And the worn-formula graveyard вҖ” Щ„ШӯШёШ©/ЩҠШ¬Щ…Ш№ЩҶШ§ are this move's corpse; write the gesture itself, never the word 'gathering'.
survivors.sector_flavor: universal вҖ” F&B: the inherited dish; fashion: the father's watch on the son's wrist; beauty: the mother's perfume on the daughter; real estate: the house that holds three generations.
survivors.judge_why: Mohamed-golded mechanism (one bite + the elder's concrete detail); CONDITION: swap example_real вҖ” Щ„ШӯШёШ§ШӘ hits the banned Щ„ШӯШёШ© root вҖ” the clean fresh line is the legal gold. Kept (unlike long_day_exhale) because the move is unique and golded, the violation is one fixable citation.
survivors.note: judge condition applied: original example_real used banned Щ„ШӯШёШ© root вҖ” replaced

survivors.move: Take the dish's literal Arabic root and bend it into a verb acting on the reader вҖ” the name itself does the persuasion, so adjectives are banned from the sentence.
survivors.skeleton: pun hook + playful-confident register + <=12 words + beats: (1) dish name, (2) its root re-conjugated onto the reader's mind/day, (3) optional smirk emoji вҖ” no second clause explaining the joke
survivors.when: Product pillar, evergreen crave posts, dishes whose names carry a live root (Щ…ЩӮЩ„ЩҲШЁШ©/Щ…ШіШӯШЁ/Щ…Ш¶ШәЩҲШ·/Щ…Щ„ЩҒЩҲЩҒ). NOT for borrowed names with no Arabic root (ШЁШұШ¬ШұШҢ ШЁЩҠШӘШІШ§) вҖ” forcing it reads as trying too hard вҖ” and never on heavy days.
survivors.example_real:
вҖҸЩ…ЩӮЩ„ЩҲШЁШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜШ¬Ш§Ш¬ Щ„Ш°ШӘЩҮШ§ ШӘШҙЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш№ЩӮЩ„Щғ.. ЩҲШӘШ®Ш·ЩҒ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩғ рҹҳҢрҹ§Ў

вҖҸ#Щ…Ш·Ш§Ш№Щ…_Ш§Щ„ШұЩҲЩ…Ш§ЩҶШіЩҠШ©
survivors.example_fresh: Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¶ШәЩҲШ· Ш§Щ„ЩҲШӯЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҠЩҒЩғ Ш¶ШәШ·Щғ рҹҳҢ
survivors.anti: Wordplay stacked twice (ШӘШҙЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш№ЩӮЩ„Щғ AND ШӘШ®Ш·ЩҒ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩғ) tips into cliche вҖ” one twist, then stop. Worst form: puns so obvious every competitor already made them, which re-creates the every-brand-sounds-the-same disease. HARD LAW: the double meaning must never be sexual or humiliating.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B-specific goldmine: Saudi dish names are verbs frozen in time. Beauty can borrow (ШЁЩ„ШіЩ…/ЩҠШЁЩ„ШіЩ…), fashion rarely can.
survivors.judge_why: Pure craft: the dish name itself does the persuasion, adjectives structurally banned, scoped to live-root names only; the one-twist anti correctly indicts its own gold's double-twist.
survivors.status: RATIFIED with condition: no sexual innuendo, no humiliation (his big rule)

survivors.move: On national or sacred days the brand steps out from behind the counter and stands inside the collective 'we' вҖ” pure shared pride or gratitude, with product, offer, and menu structurally absent.
survivors.skeleton: declarative we-statement hook + dignified celebratory register + <=12 words + beats: (1) Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ…/Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁШ© anchor, (2) collective emotion in first-person plural, (3) flag/identity close вҖ” brand exists only as signature hashtag
survivors.when: Founding Day, National Day, Flag Day, Hajj season. This is the ONLY legal move on religious/emotional days per the red lines. NOT a stage for combos, prices, or 'celebrate with our offer' вҖ” and never weld dua to the brand name in one caption.
survivors.example_real:
Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… ЩҶШӯШӘЩҒЩ„ ШЁШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІШ§ШӘЩҶШ§ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… ЩҶШ№ЩҠШҙ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШІ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ШІЩ… рҹҮёрҹҮҰ рҹҢҙ
#ЩҠЩҲЩ…_Ш§Щ„ШӘШЈШіЩҠШі_Ш§Щ„ШіШ№ЩҲШҜЩҠ #ШӯШ§ШҙЩҠ_ШЁШ§ШҙШ§
survivors.example_fresh: Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЈШіЩҠШі Щ„Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ…вҖҰ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ШІ ЩҠЩғШЁШұ ЩҒЩҠЩҶШ§ рҹҮёрҹҮҰ
survivors.anti: The smuggle: pride sentence + 'ШЁЩғЩҲЩ…ШЁЩҲ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ ШЈШұЩҲШ№' in the same breath вҖ” patriotism as a coupon. Equally dead: interchangeable greeting-card lines (ЩғЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ… ЩҲШЈЩҶШӘЩ… ШЁШ®ЩҠШұ alone) that any of 500 brands could have posted. | STALE FRAMING FIXED: commercial silence on big days is a CREATIVE CHOICE now, not a law (Mohamed struck the no-sell ban down 2026-06-12). MERGED (pride_without_pitch): differentiation = WHICH specific pride detail the brand notices.
survivors.sector_flavor: Universal law, but F&B faces the strongest temptation (occasion combos) вҖ” so the card matters most here.
survivors.judge_why: The only legal move on sacred days and it knows it вҖ” product structurally absent, the smuggle (pride + combo) named precisely in the anti; this card is load-bearing for the red lines.

survivors.move: Claim one weekday, marry it to one dish, and summon the regulars to publicly declare membership вҖ” the dish is the calendar's excuse, the ritual is the subject.
survivors.skeleton: greeting/roll-call hook + street-warm Saudi register + <=12 words + beats: (1) name the owned day-dish pair, (2) call out 'the one who...' persona, (3) one micro-action (raise hand / emoji / like)
survivors.when: Recurring weekly content, community pillar, slow news weeks вҖ” builds an owned asset that compounds. NOT on religious or national days (a shawarma Sunday cannot share the stage with Eid), and never launch two named days at once.
survivors.example_real:
ЩҮЩ„Ш§ ЩҲЩ…ШіЩҮЩ„Ш§ ЩҲЩ…Щ„ЩҠЩҠЩҠЩҲЩҶ ЩҮЩ„Ш§рҹҳҺ
Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШӘШ§ЩӮ Щ„Щ„ЩҖ #Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯШҜ_Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ЩҲШұЩ…ШұЩҠ 
ЩҠШұЩҒШ№ ЩҠШҜЩҮ ЩҲЩҠШ№Ш·ЩҠЩҶЩҠ Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩғрҹ‘Җ
survivors.example_fresh: Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ…ЩҠШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШҜЩҠ ШұШ¬Ш№вҖҰ ШӯШ· вңӢ ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩӮШ№ШҜШӘЩғЩ… Щ…ШӯШ¬ЩҲШІШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠЩҶ
survivors.anti: Dies when the day is named but never repeated (a ritual posted once is just an ad), or when every brand names the same day вҖ” the asset is exclusivity plus consistency, not the pun.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B native (weekly crave cycles map to weekdays). Portable to fitness (leg day) and retail (restock day); meaningless for real estate.
survivors.judge_why: Compounding owned asset (day+dish+persona+micro-action); sharper twin of owned_weekday_ritual вҖ” same move, same Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯШҜ_Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ЩҲШұЩ…ШұЩҠ gold вҖ” absorb the merged card's cross-sector flavor line.

survivors.move: Describe the dish only by the future behavior it causes in the eater вҖ” the loop back, the repeat order, the predicted next visit вҖ” so the product is proven by what people DO, with zero taste adjectives.
survivors.skeleton: name-then-consequence hook + knowing-smirk register + <=12 words + beats: (1) dish or single trial named, (2) the behavioral prophecy (you'll be back / we know your next order), (3) confident close, no explanation
survivors.when: Product pillar, signature items with genuine repeat behavior, evergreen crave posts. NOT for brand-new untested items (a return-loop claim with no returners is an invented promise) and not stacked with offers.

Ш·Ш№Щ… ЩҠШ®Щ„Щ‘ЩҠЩғ ШӘШұШ¬Ш№ Щ„ЩҮ рҹҳӢвқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ”ҘвҒЈ

survivors.anti: Sliding back into adjective porn ('Щ„Ш°ЩҠШ°ШҢ Ш·Ш№Щ… Ш®ШұШ§ЩҒЩҠШҢ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ ШЈШұЩҲШ№') вҖ” the second an adjective appears the move is dead. Also worn: 'ЩҠШ®Щ„ЩҠЩғ ШӘШұШ¬Ш№ Щ„ЩҮ' verbatim is one brand's line; copy the MECHANIC (predicted behavior), never the phrase, and 'Щ„ЩҮ Ш·Ш№Щ… Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ' is banned outright.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B core (craving literally is repeat behavior). Beauty parallel: 'you'll repurchase before it's empty'. Useless where purchase cycles are yearly.
survivors.judge_why: Product proven by predicted behavior, zero adjectives; anti correctly bans copying the gold's phrase and Щ„ЩҮ Ш·Ш№Щ… Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ outright вҖ” mechanic-not-phrase discipline at its best.

survivors.move: Surface one ultra-specific shared childhood artifact from the audience's generation and ask 'do you remember?' вҖ” the brand is the friend who found the old photo, and the product appears only as that era's companion, if at all.
survivors.skeleton: artifact-then-question hook + soft-gasp register + <=12 words + beats: (1) the named relic (Spacetoon characters, school sandwich, juice box), (2) ellipsis pause, (3) the memory-check question (ШӘШ°ЩғШұШӘЩҲЩҮЩ…Шҹ/Ш°ЩғШұШӘЩғШҹ)
survivors.when: Evergreen community content, anniversary moments, collabs with era-icons (the HerfyГ—Spacetoon model), millennial/Gen-Z targeting. NOT for audiences too young for the reference, and never as cover for a price push вҖ” monetized nostalgia reads as manipulation.
survivors.example_real:
ШҙШ®ШөЩҠШ§ШӘ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҠШ§Щ… Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩҶШіЩүвҖҰ ШӘШ°ЩғЩ‘ШұШӘЩҲЩҮЩ…ШҹрҹӨ©вҒЈ
вҒЈ
#ШҙШЁШ§ШЁ_Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩӮШЁЩ„ #ЩҮШұЩҒЩҠ #ШіШЁЩҠШіШӘЩҲЩҶ #Herfy #SpacetoonвҒЈ
survivors.example_fresh: ЩҒШ·ЩҲШұ ШЈЩҠШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШұШіШ©вҖҰ ШҙШ·ЩҠШұШ© Ш¬ШЁЩҶШ© ЩҲШ№ШөЩҠШұ Ш№Щ„ШЁШ©. Ш°ЩғШұШӘЩғШҹ рҹҘ№
survivors.anti: Era-vague mush ('ШЈЩҠШ§Щ… ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩҲШ©') that triggers nothing вҖ” nostalgia only fires on a SPECIFIC artifact the reader can see. Also fails when the reference is borrowed from another culture's childhood (US cafeteria tropes) instead of the Saudi 90s/2000s canon.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B is privileged: taste memory is the strongest human memory channel (school canteen, grandmother's kitchen). Retail can use toys/stationery; banks cannot.
survivors.judge_why: Specific-artifact law (Saudi 90s/2000s canon, no era-mush) is what keeps nostalgia off the banned-sludge floor; HerfyГ—Spacetoon gold proves it. Absorbs the truncated do_you_remember duplicate.

survivors.move: Announce a new branch by reversing hospitality вҖ” the brand greets the CITY as the honored guest who lights up the house (ШӘЩҶЩҲШұЩҶШ§), making the town the hero and the branch merely the majlis.
survivors.skeleton: greeting hook (ЩҠШ§ ЩҮЩ„Ш§/ШӯЩҠШ§ЩғЩ…) + host-at-the-door register + <=12 words + beats: (1) direct address to the town's people by name, (2) the hospitality reversal (you honor US / we became neighbors), (3) zero product mention
survivors.when: Branch openings, expansion milestones, entering smaller cities (Ш№ШұШ№Шұ, ШЈШЁЩҮШ§, ШӯШ§ШҰЩ„ вҖ” where being SEEN matters most). NOT as a sales hook вҖ” no opening offers in the same caption вҖ” and not for the 400th Riyadh branch where scale-pride is the truer move.
survivors.example_real: Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШӯЩҮ ЩҒШұШӯШӘЩҠЩҶШҢ Ш§ЩҒШӘШӘШ§Шӯ ЩҒШұШ№ЩҶШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№ШұШ№Шұ ЩҲШҙЩҲЩҒШӘЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ШӘЩҶЩҲШұЩҶШ§
survivors.example_fresh: ЩҠШ§ ЩҮЩ„Ш§ ШЁШЈЩҮЩ„ ШЈШЁЩҮШ§вҖҰ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… ШөШұЩҶШ§ Ш¬ЩҠШұШ§ЩҶЩғЩ… рҹӨҚ
survivors.anti: Treating the opening as the brand's achievement ('ЩҲШөЩ„ЩҶШ§! ШӘЩҲШіШ№ЩҶШ§!') вҖ” the moment the brand congratulates itself instead of greeting the town, the hospitality code inverts and reads as corporate conquest. | MERGED INSIGHT (city_name_pride): the caption must survive a resident fact-check вҖ” one TRUE local detail; city-name swap localization is the failure.
survivors.sector_flavor: Universal for any physical expansion, but F&B carries it best вҖ” a restaurant IS a majlis, so the host-guest frame is literal, not metaphor.
survivors.judge_why: True hospitality-code reversal (the city is the guest, ШӘЩҶЩҲШұЩҶШ§) with corpus gold; the anti nails the exact inversion that kills it вҖ” brand congratulating itself.

survivors.move: Stage the sofra as a theater scene where dishes are named characters taking their positions вҖ” the writer is a narrator describing an entrance (ЩҠШӘШөШҜШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҮШҜ), not a menu listing items.
survivors.skeleton: scene-opening hook (time or curtain: ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҒШ·Ш§Шұ ШӯШ§ЩҶ / Ш§Щ„ШіЩҒШұШ© Ш§ЩғШӘЩ…Щ„ШӘ) + cinematic-warm register + <=12 words + beats: (1) the moment named, (2) two dishes maximum given positions/roles, (3) the spread implied complete
survivors.when: Ramadan iftar/suhoor, Eid spreads, Friday family lunch вҖ” any moment with a real shared table. Best with heritage dish pairs (jereesh + kabli). NOT for single grab-and-go items, and during Ramadan it stays scene-only: no prices, no 'order now' welded on.
survivors.example_real: ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҒШ·Ш§Шұ ШӯШ§ЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш¬ШұЩҠШҙ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩғШ§ШЁЩ„ЩҠ ЩҠШӘШөШҜШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҮШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§ШҰШҜШ©.
survivors.example_fresh: Ш§Щ„ШіЩҒШұШ© Ш§ЩғШӘЩ…Щ„ШӘ: Ш§Щ„ЩғШЁШіШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶШө ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩ„ЩҠЩӮ Ш№ЩҶ ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶЩҮШ§ рҹ‘‘
survivors.anti: Listing more than two dishes turns theater back into a menu; and stock sofra-sentiment ('ШіЩҒШұШӘЩҶШ§ Ш№Ш§Щ…ШұШ©ШҢ ШЈШ¬ЩҲШ§ШЎ Ш№Ш§ШҰЩ„ЩҠШ©') with no staging verb loses the move вҖ” the dishes must DO something (enter, lead, take the center), not just exist.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B exclusive at full power вҖ” the sofra is the sector's native stage. Hospitality variant: the majlis as the set, qahwa and dates as the cast.
survivors.judge_why: Dishes as named characters with staging verbs, hard-capped at two вҖ” the one mechanism that makes a menu post cinema instead of a list; Ramadan-legal by construction.
survivors.status: RATIFIED вҳ…2 with condition (Mohamed 2026-06-12 23:57): В«It need more wiringВ»

survivors.move: Sketch a two-person social scene with roles so precise everyone instantly casts a real friend in it, then command the tag вҖ” the product is only the table the characters meet over.
survivors.skeleton: scene-shorthand hook + mention command В· insider playful register В· <=10 words + 'Щ…ЩҶШҙЩҶЩҮЩ… рҹ‘Ү' В· beat 1: the scene in shorthand ('same seat, same roles'), beat 2: the tag command.
survivors.when: Community pillar, weekends, reunion seasons (post-Hajj, post-travel, holidays). NOT on solemn days; never when the assigned role could shame or mock the tagged person.

survivors.sector_flavor: universal вҖ” the confession adapts: F&B appetites, beauty routines ('still sleeping in makeup?'), retail hoarding habits, gym excuses.

survivors.move: Frame the modest choice as presence and power вҖ” the garment amplifies her, never hides her вҖ” and let pride carry the line with zero defensiveness and zero preaching.
survivors.skeleton: proud-statement hook + dignified warm register + <=8 words + 2 beats: the modest choice вҶ’ the power it carries
survivors.when: Abaya/hijab lines, modest activewear, occasion modestwear. NEVER comparative (no judging less-covered women), never veil-removal narratives, never 'despite the hijab' framing вҖ” these are red lines, not preferences.
survivors.example_real: In Love with these AbayasрҹҢё
survivors.example_fresh: ШӯШҙЩ…Ш© ЩҲШЈЩҶШ§ЩӮШ©Шҹ Ш№Щ…ШұЩҮЩ… Щ…Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҲШ§ Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұЩҠЩҶ
survivors.anti: Sermonizing вҖ” the post turns from fashion to fatwa and the warmth dies; or defensive framing ('Щ…ШӯШӘШҙЩ…Ш© ШЁШі ШіШӘШ§ЩҠЩ„Шҙ') where the 'ШЁШі' concedes modesty needed an excuse.
survivors.sector_flavor: Fashion/beauty specific вҖ” the core identity move of this lens; retail can extend it to modest sportswear and occasion gifting.
survivors.judge_why: Sector-core identity move with the red lines handled correctly вҖ” but 'In Love with these Abayas' evidences nothing; per the self-audit rule a card with no demonstrating gold is not ratification-ready. Find the real gold or it stays drafted.

survivors.move: State the client-confirmed offer as plain news вҖ” item plus number first, the fact carries the post, zero hype words, zero invented scarcity.
survivors.skeleton: hook=the offer fact itself (item + price/term up front); register=calm shop-sign Arabic, news not noise; <=15w; beats: [item] -> [real price/term] -> [true window or quiet CTA].
survivors.when: fits: any written-confirmed price, bundle, opening deal, loyalty perk вҖ” the most common client brief; CTAs now allowed even on religious/emotional days. must-not: run without client confirmation of offer AND dates; no 'ШЈЩӮЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұЩҲШ¶/ШӯШөШұЩҠ/Щ„ЩҒШӘШұШ© Щ…ШӯШҜЩҲШҜШ©' unless the limit is real; no exclamation stacking.
survivors.example_real: ЩӮЩҮЩҖЩҲШӘЩғ ЩғЩҖЩ„ ШЈШӯЩҖЩҖШҜ ШЁЩҖ5рҹ©ө
survivors.example_fresh: ЩӮЩҮЩҲШӘЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҶШ§ШҢ ЩғЩ„ Ш¬Щ…Ш№Ш© Ш·ЩҲЩ„ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҮШұ.
survivors.anti: Hype inflation вҖ” burying a true offer under fake superlatives makes real news read fake; one invented deadline or price poisons every future offer post the brand makes.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B: price-on-item shop-sign style (the ШЁЩҖ5 pattern). Fashion/beauty: name the edit/collection + the term, never 'sale!' screaming. Retail: item + true delivery window as fact. Real estate: payment term as a plain number, never 'ЩҒШұШөШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Шұ'.
survivors.judge_why: Fills the most common client brief with zero existing coverage, directly operationalizes tonight's no-invented-offers law, and carries verbatim corpus gold (ЩӮЩҮЩҖЩҲШӘЩғ ЩғЩҖЩ„ ШЈШӯЩҖЩҖШҜ ШЁЩҖ5); fresh example is 8 words and law-clean.

survivors.move: Anchor the caption to the real minutes around maghrib/the cannon or the pre-fajr suhoor window, and sell with dignity inside that true native tension вҖ” never manufacture it.
survivors.skeleton: hook=the clock ('ШЁШ§ЩӮЩҠ Ш№ШҙШұ ШҜЩӮШ§ЩҠЩӮ...'); register=shared-hunger warmth, never mockery; <=15w; beats: [true time marker: Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҒШ№/Ш§Щ„Щ…ШәШұШЁ/ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ¬Шұ] -> [table or product state] -> [CTA that respects reality, e.g. order for tomorrow].
survivors.when: fits: Ramadan only вҖ” iftar minus 10-30 minutes and the suhoor window; selling CTAs are now allowed on religious days (old ban struck down). must-not: put Allah's name and the brand name in the same caption; promise delivery speeds that aren't operationally real; run the mechanic outside Ramadan; mock hunger or exploit it.
survivors.example_real: ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҒШ·Ш§Шұ ШӯШ§ЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш¬ШұЩҠШҙ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩғШ§ШЁЩ„ЩҠ ЩҠШӘШөШҜШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҮШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§ШҰШҜШ©.
survivors.example_fresh: ШЁШ§ЩӮЩҠ Ш№ШҙШұ ШҜЩӮШ§ЩҠЩӮ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШәШұШЁ. Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ…Шұ Ш¬Ш§ЩҮШІШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш¬ШұЩҠШҙ ЩҲШұШ§ЩҮ. Ш§Ш·Щ„ШЁЩҮ Щ„ШЁЩғШұШ©.
survivors.anti: Fake urgency вҖ” a countdown wrapped around an undeliverable promise ('ЩҠЩҲШөЩ„Щғ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ°Ш§ЩҶ' when it can't) burns trust at the year's most-watched table; pairing the clock with dua+brand in one caption is a hard law violation.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B owns this natively (iftar table, suhoor delivery). Retail/beauty: pivot to suhoor-prep and eid-prep clocks. Fashion: the 'before the eid rush' window. Healthcare: hydration and suhoor-advice clock with zero selling pressure.
survivors.judge_why: Flagship application of the struck-down-ban ruling (dignified selling inside a true religious-day window), distinct from weather_window because the maghrib/suhoor clock has its own law interactions (no Allah+brand, no undeliverable pre-adhan promises); corpus real verified, fresh example 11 words clean.

survivors.move: Show one true, verifiable production fact вҖ” the hour, the charcoal, the hand-step вҖ” and let it stand alone as the evidence; adjectives are banned from the caption.
survivors.skeleton: hook=an odd specific (Ш§Щ„ШіШ§Ш№Ш© ШЈШұШЁШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ¬ШұШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШӯЩ…ШҢ ШӘШӯЩ…ЩҠШө Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҮШ§Шұ); register=documentary whisper, present tense; <=15w; beats: [time/element] -> [the hand or act] -> [full stop before any praise].
survivors.when: fits: any brand with a real craft step the client verifies (dough, roast, stitch, blend); strongest as evergreen product-pillar content. must-not: invent a process the client doesn't actually do (invented fact = kill); don't bolt it onto occasions it cheapens.
survivors.example_real: ЩғЩ„ Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ© ШӘЩҒШұЩӮ. ЩҲЩ…ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҠШ·Щ„Ш№ ЩғШұШ§ШіШӘ ШҘЩҠШ·Ш§Щ„ЩҠ
survivors.example_fresh: Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш¬ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„ШіШ§Ш№Ш© ШЈШұШЁШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ¬ШұШҢ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШөШӯЩү ШЈШӯШҜ.
survivors.anti: Adjective relapse вҖ” adding 'Ш·Ш§ШІШ¬/Щ„Ш°ЩҠШ°' after the fact deletes the proof and turns evidence back into ad-speak; fake specificity (a 4am dough that is actually frozen) is an invented fact and a trust kill.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B: dough hours, charcoal, spice toasting. Fashion: stitch counts, fabric origin. Beauty: ingredient sourcing, batch process. Real estate: build material or inspection step. Healthcare: a protocol step вҖ” never patient stories.
survivors.judge_why: Genuinely new mechanic (verifiable production fact as the whole caption, adjectives banned) with a strong anti tying fake specificity to the invented-fact law вҖ” capped at 3 until corpus gold exists (example_real = NONE). | corpus gold found (process-steps line, Pizza Hut SA).

survivors.move: Admit one true, small, peripheral flaw вҖ” the parking, the wait, the queue вҖ” in the first breath, then let the product justify enduring it.
survivors.skeleton: hook=the confession opener ('ШөШӯЩҠШӯ...'); register=relaxed majlis honesty, smiling not apologizing; <=15w; beats: [own the flaw plainly] -> [pivot 'ШЁШі'] -> [the thing that makes it worth it].
survivors.when: fits: brands with a strong product and a known operational friction customers already joke about вҖ” the confession buys trust in everything else. must-not: confess core flaws (food quality, hygiene, safety, price fairness); never use it for a flaw the brand could fix and chooses not to; the pivot must never humiliate staff or customers (Mohamed's new big rule).
survivors.example_real: NONE BY DESIGN вҖ” zero confession moves exist in 6,412 corpus captions: this is WHITESPACE (nobody does it = pure differentiation if Mohamed ratifies)
survivors.example_fresh: ШөШӯЩҠШӯ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮЩҒ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩҶШ§ Ш¶ЩҠЩӮШ©ШҢ ШЁШі Ш§Щ„ЩғШЁШіШ© ШӘШіШӘШ§ЩҮЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҒЩ‘Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ©.
survivors.anti: Fake humility вҖ” confessing a flattering non-flaw ('Ш№ЩҠШЁЩҶШ§ ШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш·Щ„ШЁ ЩҠШ®Щ„Шө ШЁШіШұШ№Ш©') reads as ad-speak and dies instantly; confessing the wrong flaw (cleanliness, sourcing) plants real doubt instead of trust.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B: parking, queue, the wait at peak. Retail: crowded weekends, one-branch-only. Fashion: sizes genuinely selling out (only if true). Beauty: a shade-range gap being fixed. Healthcare/real estate: avoid вҖ” trust stakes are too high for play.
survivors.judge_why: Fresh trust mechanic no ratified card touches, and its must-not clause already encodes Mohamed's new no-humiliation rule (peripheral flaws only, never staff/customers/core quality); 9-word clean example but no corpus proof yet.

survivors.move: Flip hospitality on its head: declare that the customers are the ones honoring the brand вҖ” the place is nothing without them вҖ” and thank them with zero ask attached.
survivors.skeleton: gratitude declarative В· humble-warm register built on the Saudi hosting idiom (ЩҶЩҲШұШӘЩҲЩҶШ§/ШӘЩҶЩҲШұЩҶШ§) В· <=12 words В· beat 1: the brand's smallness alone, beat 2: the audience as the light.
survivors.when: Openings, milestones, anniversaries, the day after a big turnout. NOT next to an offer вҖ” gratitude with a coupon stapled to it reads as bait.
survivors.example_real: Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШӯЩҮ ЩҒШұШӯШӘЩҠЩҶШҢ Ш§ЩҒШӘШӘШ§Шӯ ЩҒШұШ№ЩҶШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№ШұШ№Шұ ЩҲШҙЩҲЩҒШӘЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ШӘЩҶЩҲШұЩҶШ§
survivors.example_fresh: Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩ„ ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶЩғЩ… Щ…Ш¬ШұШҜ ЩғШұШ§ШіЩҠ ЩҲШ·Ш§ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШӘ.. ЩҶЩҲШұШӘЩҲЩҶШ§ рҹӨҚ
survivors.anti: Reflex-ЩҶЩҲШұШӘЩҲЩҶШ§ pasted under every post until the idiom dies. Reserve it for moments when people actually showed up, and name what they filled.
survivors.sector_flavor: universal вҖ” gyms thank the 6am regulars, salons the loyal chairs, restaurants the full tables, showrooms the families who walked in; specificity of WHO showed up keeps it alive.
survivors.judge_why: Survives as the declarative hospitality inversion (ЩҶЩҲШұШӘЩҲЩҶШ§ вҖ” the place is nothing without you), mechanically distinct from gratitude_repost's UGC curation; corpus real verified, but adjacency to gratitude_repost and modesty_as_presence keeps it at 3.

survivors.move: Replace every adjective with the one sound the product actually makes вҖ” the onomatopoeia is the entire description.
survivors.skeleton: hook=the sound word itself or 'Ш§ШіЩ…Ш№ЩҮШ§'; register=playful minimal, near-silent caption built for sound-on reels; <=15w; beats: [invoke the ear before the tongue] -> [sound word + product] -> [stop; nothing after the sound].
survivors.when: fits: products with a signature audible moment вҖ” ЩӮШұЩ…ШҙШ©ШҢ ШЈШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ…ШұШҢ ШөШЁЩ‘Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҮЩҲШ©ШҢ ЩҒЩҲШұШ§ЩҶ; pairs naturally with ASMR-style video. must-not: any sound word with a possible sexual-innuendo reading (new big rule вҖ” no innuendo in wordplay); never stack the sound with adjectives; retire a sound word before it wears into the next 'Щ„ЩҮ Ш·Ш№Щ… Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ'.
survivors.example_real: Щ…ЩҶ ШөЩҲШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұЩ…ШҙШ© ШЁШӘШ№ШұЩҒЩҲЩҶ Ш§ЩҶЩғЩ… Ш§Ш®ШӘШұШӘЩҲ ШөШӯ
survivors.example_fresh: Ш§ШіЩ…Ш№ЩҮШ§ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Щ„Ш§ ШӘШ°ЩҲЩӮЩҮШ§вҖҰ ЩӮШұЩ…ШҙШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҲШіШӘ ШӘШіШЁЩӮ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш№Щ….
survivors.anti: Compression leak вҖ” backing the sound up with adjectives ('ЩӮШұЩ…ШҙШ© ЩҲЩ„Ш°ЩҠШ° ЩҲЩ…ЩӮШұЩ…Шҙ') admits the sound didn't carry it; forcing a sound onto a silent product (an abaya doesn't ЩӮШұЩ…Шҙ) reads as template bleed.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B: ЩӮШұЩ…ШҙШ©/ШЈШІЩҠШІ/ШөШЁЩ‘Ш© вҖ” the home turf. Beauty: the spray's 'ШЁШҙЩ‘Ш©', the compact's click. Fashion: fabric rustle, used sparingly вҖ” visual sectors lean on texture instead. Retail: the unboxing tear and click.
survivors.judge_why: Distinct compression play (onomatopoeia replaces all adjectives) that self-polices the new innuendo rule and its own wear-out risk (retire the sound before it becomes the next Щ„ЩҮ Ш·Ш№Щ… Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ); 8-word clean example, no corpus gold yet. | corpus gold found (47 sound-word candidates вҖ” ЩӮШұЩ…ШҙШ© is live Saudi vocabulary).

killed: owned_weekday_ritual вҖ” exact duplicate of named_weekday_ritual: same underlying move (claim a weekday, name it, greet the regulars) and the SAME Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯШҜ_Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ЩҲШұЩ…ШұЩҠ gold. The named_ version is sharper (dish-day pair + 'the one who...' persona beat). Merged into named_weekday_ritual.

table_role_tag вҖ” exact duplicate of tag_the_character: identical ШЁШ§ШұЩҶШІ gold (ЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ№ШҜШ©.. ЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲШ§Шұ). Kept the two-role-scene version for sharper casting precision and cross-sector reach; its qa3da insight merges into the survivor.

do_you_remember вҖ” duplicate of nostalgia_checkpoint (same resurface-the-memory-and-ask move, visible from the 'ResurвҖҰ' stem) AND it arrived truncated in the payload: unverifiable content cannot be ratified вҖ” readiness claims obey the evidence rule.

long_day_exhale вҖ” double kill: (1) example_real is built on the banned word (ШЈШ®ЩҠШұШ§ЩӢ Щ„ШӯШёШ© Ш§ШіШӘШұШ®Ш§ШЎ) and the card admits it; (2) the underlying frame вҖ” tired worker rewarded by arriving food вҖ” is among the most worn frames in Gulf F&B delivery copy, and the anti polices misery-inflation, not the wear itself. ClichГ©-prone, anti can't save it.

not_just_reframe вҖ” 'Щ…ЩҲ Щ…Ш¬ШұШҜ X' is a fill-in-the-blank already saturated across Arabic ad-speak; the anti polices the second clause while the disease is the literal opener, which every copier copies verbatim. This re-creates the every-brand-sounds-the-same disease the system exists to kill.

craft_process_proof вҖ” behind-the-counter making-of (the 4am dough, the charcoal, the spice toast) as zero-adjective product evidence; the biggest F&B gap in the pool вҖ” every product card argues by consequence or wordplay, none by shown process.
